import io
import string
import list

fn tokenize(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut cur = ""
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(v)
      if v == 32 or v == 9 or v == 13 or v == 10
        if not string.is_empty(cur)
          match string.parse_int(cur)
          when Some(x)
            result = list.push(result, x)
          when None
            ()
          end
          cur = ""
        end
      else
        cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(v)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(cur)
    match string.parse_int(cur)
    when Some(x)
      result = list.push(result, x)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn read_one_line() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

let line1 = read_one_line()
let line2 = read_one_line()
let a = tokenize(line1)
let b = tokenize(line2)
let n = list.len(a)
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match list.get(a, i)
  when Some(x)
    match list.get(b, i)
    when Some(y)
      println("#{x}+#{y}=#{x + y}")
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
